MenuItem.title: MenuItem
MenuItem.description: An individual food item available on the menu catalog

id.description: Unique identifier of the menu item

price.description: Cost of the item in Rs.

popular.description: Show a popular badge on storefront

outOfStock.description: Marked if items are temporarily depleted

Category.title: Category
Category.description: A group tab to organize similar dishes together

KitchenConfig.title: KitchenConfig
KitchenConfig.description: Cloud kitchen configurations including name and contact details

Order.title: Order
Order.description: An order submitted by a customer for delivery or pickup

/configs/kitchen.description: Single config document defining the main storefront name and properties

/categories/{categoryId}.description: Collection of categories that items are cataloged in

/menu/{menuItemId}.description: Collection of all menu foods listed in the active catalog

/orders/{orderId}.description: Transaction log collection of physical orders from the customer storefront
